response.justification: Aisha has strong full-stack experience, deep systems thinking, and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks clear evidence of staff-level technical strategy ownership, Python mastery, or direct experience with AI-driven code production at scale — key for this role. Their work with DLang and open-source tools is impressive but doesn't fully align with the required Python/TypeScript focus or agentic code review culture.
strengths: Proven experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
Strong distributed systems background from high-throughput data platforms and microservices
Demonstrated ownership via open-source projects and operational infrastructure (K8s, CI/CD)
concerns: No clear evidence of Python mastery — primary required language is underrepresented
Limited visibility into AI-native code review workflows or direct experience with LLM-generated code production
German language barrier may hinder stakeholder coordination in Berlin-based team
